articles.title: Andhra Pradesh Fire Services to observe Fire Safety Week from April 14 to 20
articles.description: Andhra Pradesh State Disaster Response and Fire Services Department to hold awareness programmes, mock drills and training during Fire Safety Week from April 14 to 20

articles.title: Bihar CM announcement to be made tomorrow, Shivraj Chouhan to chair key meet
articles.description: Union minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan has been appointed observer to oversee the election of the BJP legislative party leader.

articles.title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief in Tamil Nadu
articles.description: However, the EC order did not specify a tenure for him. The question is whether Mr. Rathore would be entitled to a minimum two-year tenure, as mandated by the Supreme Court in the  landmark Prakash Singh case. However, this ruling applies only to appointments made through the UPSC-led process

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Eminem on life, challenges and success: ‘If you have enemies, good. That means you…’
articles.description: Eminem's philosophy suggests that having enemies indicates a commitment to one's beliefs. If you lack opposition, it may mean you've played it too safe. Criticism should be seen as confirmation of integrity rather than a failure.

articles.title: Election Commission appoints Odisha-cadre IPS Officer as police observer for West Bengal polls
articles.description: M. Sarvana Vivek, a 2015-batch IPS officer of the Odisha cadre, will oversee police-related arrangements during the two-phase polls, said the Election Commission

articles.title: More than 62k personnel deployed for Census in Chhattisgarh; exercise to start on May 1

topStories.description: US action in the Strait of Hormuz, tighter physical supply and rising speculative longs are set to keep crude prices supported this week.

dailyNews.description: Israel's envoy to the US has far-right ties and has engaged in contentious rhetoric during Lebanese peace negotiations.

dailyNews.title: SEN MITCH McCONNELL: Hungary’s voters offer a lesson for those on the right drawn to Orban
dailyNews.description: Viktor Orban's ouster in Hungary's elections challenges the American right's embrace of his government and its misalignment with U.S. foreign policy goals.

dailyNews.title: 'Miracle fruit' may help cancer patients overcome chemo side effect that can lead to dangerous weight loss
dailyNews.description: "Miracle fruit," a small red berry from West Africa, is gaining attention for helping cancer patients cope with taste changes that result from chemotherapy.

dailyNews.title: PRISHA MOSLEY, JOSH PAYNE: Our legal appeal could reshape justice for victims of gender 'care' cases
dailyNews.description: Detransitioner Prisha Mosley alleges doctors pushed her into gender transition as a teen, and now a North Carolina appeals court will decide if her lawsuit can proceed.

dailyNews.title: Snubbed by Trump, GOP candidates fighting for re-election act like they have his backing anyway
dailyNews.description: Republican incumbents facing primary challenges are leaning into Trump imagery in campaign ads, even when the president has endorsed their rivals.

dailyNews.title: Four reasons why Markwayne Mullin may be the steady hand DHS needs at a critical time
dailyNews.description: Four reasons new DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin, a no-nonsense Oklahoman who unlike Chuck Schumer has worked with his hands, could be right for the job.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's birthright citizenship fight is about history, not hysteria
dailyNews.description: President Trump's executive order on birthright citizenship is restorative, not revisionist, based on early Fourteenth Amendment interpretations.

dailyNews.title: The AI you use every day is biased — and it’s quietly shaping your worldview, new report says
dailyNews.description: AI models show a center-left ideological bias across the spectrum, according to an America First Policy Institute report on AI transparency and safety.

dailyNews.title: Why Eric Swalwell was forced to quit California governor’s race after sexual misconduct allegations

topStories.description: The Dutch king and queen are set to stay at the White House on Monday night. At a time of trans-Atlantic tension, the Netherlands isn’t sure how it feels about that.

dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is ratcheting up attacks on environmental protections that Make America Healthy Again followers hold dear.

dailyNews.title: 4/12: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks collapse; oil prices fueling inflation amid Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Latest on Iran war as Trump announces Strait of Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: A marathon round of talks between the U.S. and Iran over the weekend failed to produce a peace agreement, leading President Trump to announce a bloackade of the Strait of Hormuz. Imtiaz Tyab and Taurean Small have more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz, intercept ships that paid Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the U.S. Navy will begin blockading ships from entering or exiting the Strait of Hormuz and intercept vessels that have paid tolls to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Iran's parliament speaker says U.S. will be "nostalgic" for $4 gas as oil prices fuel inflation
dailyNews.description: Iranian parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf said Americans would soon be "nostalgic for $4-$5 gas" after President Trump announced a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday. Taurean Small reports on the pain at the pump currently being felt across the United States.

dailyNews.title: UK 'not supporting' U.S. Iran blockade as France's Macron confirms 'multinational' talks on the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump had signaled that other countries would help the U.S. in its blockade.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices surge above $100 as U.S. Navy to blockade Iran's ports after peace talks fail
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he ordered the U.S. Navy to find and interdict any ship in international waters that has paid a toll to Iran to transit the strait.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens 50% tariffs on China as report suggests plans for arms shipment to Iran
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has threatened to impose a 50% tariff on China, after a report on Sunday that Beijing was preparing a weapons shipment to Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump blasts Pope Leo for criticism of U.S. foreign policy
dailyNews.description: Leo, the first U.S.-born pope who hails from Chicago, has condemned Trump's war effort with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
